display.purpose: Page titles and dashboard greeting only

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Sage background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2D6A4F; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2D6A4F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Mist background, ink text, stone border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #FAFAF8; color: #1A1A18; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 20px; border: 1px solid #E2DED9; border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F5F3F0; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2D6A4F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default text input with sage focus.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #fff; color: #1A1A18; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #E2DED9; border-radius: 14px; outline: none; width: 240px; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2D6A4F; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #2D6A4F; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B6762; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default card container. White on mist, no shadow.
components.html:
Today's Schedule

3 sessions today
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1A1A18; margin: 0 0 4px 0; } .ds-card-text { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6B6762; margin: 0; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status badge. Sage or stone-light background.
components.css: .ds-badge { background: #2D6A4F; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 8px; display: inline-block; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-badge-secondary { background: #F5F3F0; color: #3C3B38; }

narrative.overview: TherapyDesk is a tool, not a dashboard. It should feel like picking up a well-balanced instrument — precise, quiet, and immediately useful. Every pixel earns its place; nothing is decorative. The palette centers on a restrained clinical sage against warm stone neutrals, evoking a calm, professional therapy room rather than a generic SaaS interface.
keyCharacteristics: Sharp and minimal — generous whitespace, tight typography, no decorative elements
Flat by default — depth via spacing and typography, not shadows
Clinical warmth — sage green on warm neutrals, not cold blue-white
Trust through precision — alignment, consistency, and restraint carry authority

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No shadows. Depth is communicated through spacing, tonal background layering (stone-light on mist), and typography scale. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, active).

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Sage is the only accent color. Never use multiple accent colors.

rules.name: The Serif Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Instrument Serif is a display-only face. Never use it for body text, labels, buttons, or navigation.

rules.name: The No-Light-Text Rule
rules.body: Font weight 300 (light) is prohibited for body text. Minimum body weight is 500 (medium).

dos: Do use sage as the only accent. No second accent colors.
Do prefer flat surfaces over shadows.
Do use font weight 500 or higher for body text at 13px to maintain contrast.
Do use Instrument Serif only for page-level headings.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on prose.
Do use the minimum interactions principle: the default path from opening the app to signing a SOAP note should be <= 3 clicks.
donts: Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or side-stripe borders (border-left >1px accent).
Don't use uppercase 'eyebrow' labels above every section heading.
Don't use numbered section markers (01/02/03) as default scaffolding.
Don't use text that overflows its container at any breakpoint.
Don't use hero-metric templates (big number + small label + supporting text).
Don't use identical card grids repeated endlessly.
Don't use decorative UI patterns that don't serve the workflow.
Don't animate CSS layout properties; prefer transform + opacity.
Don't skip reduced-motion support; every animation needs a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
